features.name: Frontend Static File Serving
features.description: Built React dashboard (client/dist/) served automatically by FastAPI via StaticFiles mount at /. Single-command make run builds frontend + starts API.

tests.notes: Verification is manual — start server and navigate to /

subtasks.name: Mount StaticFiles in api/main.py after API routes
Add client-install, client-build, run targets to Makefile
Update API client to use relative URLs by default for same-origin serving

features.notes: Frontend mount is conditional (skipped if client/dist/ doesn't exist). API-only dev workflow unchanged.

features.name: Manual Testing via Frontend Dashboard
features.description: Upload an image through the React dashboard UI, run the full detection pipeline on it, and see violation results, annotated image, and challan generation in real-time.

subtasks.name: Add image upload widget to LiveDetection page
Display violation results and annotated image
Add "Generate Challan" action from test results

features.notes: POST /api/violations/upload endpoint exists. Only frontend work needed.

features.name: Frontend Application Shell
features.description: App layout with sidebar navigation, top navbar, dark/light theme toggle, page transition animations, and settings page.

tests.notes: Manual verification — start server and navigate routes.

features.notes: Conditional static file serving via FastAPI StaticFiles mount.

features.name: Frontend Dashboard & Analytics
features.description: Dashboard page with real-time KPI cards, trend chart, recent activity feed, camera placeholder. Analytics page with trend chart, pie chart, top offenders ranking.

tests.notes: 4 unit tests for type/severity breakdown, weekday trend, offender ranking.

subtasks.name: Dashboard KPI cards from API summary
Analytics pie chart by violation type

features.notes: Backend GET /api/analytics/summary powers the KPI cards.

features.name: Frontend Shared Component Library
features.description: Reusable UI components: Badge, ViolationCard, PlateNumber, ConfidenceMeter, AsyncBoundary (loading/error/empty), StatCard, KPICard, StatusBadge, SectionHeader, ActivityRow. Plus data layer: useFetch hook, API client, constants, types, badge classes, build config (Vite+TS+Tailwind). 23 unit tests across 6 test files.

subtasks.name: Build config (Vite 8, TS 5, Tailwind 4, Vitest 4, ESLint)

features.notes: Components are tree-shaken, Tailwind CSS v4 with CSS variables for theming.

features.name: Image Preprocessing
features.description: CLAHE low-light enhancement + basic resize applied before detection.

features.name: Helmet Violation Detection
features.description: Fine-tuned YOLOv8m detects WithHelmet/WithoutHelmet/TripleRiding/Plate on the master dataset.

tests.notes: 5 unit tests for mapping logic. Full integration requires model weights.

features.notes: Model trained on Kaggle, weights placed and pipeline confirmed working.

features.name: Triple Riding Detection
features.description: YOLOv8-Pose occupant counting within padded vehicle bbox.

tests.notes: 3 tests for pose counting, edge bboxes, empty images.

features.name: License Plate Recognition
features.description: Plate detection + PaddleOCR PP-OCRv4 + KA-format validation/correction.

tests.notes: 4 unit tests covering formatting, valid plates, OCR confusion correction, out-of-state rejection.

subtasks.name: Measure character accuracy on DataCluster sample

features.notes: KA RegEx and 8x character heuristic swaps implemented. evaluate_lpr() in src/evaluate.py computes char/plate accuracy on 47-image DataCluster dataset (20 with GT).

features.name: Evidence Packaging
features.description: Annotated image + JSON metadata + SHA-256 hash, with legal section mapping.

tests.notes: 8 tests: hash, severity, legal sections including seatbelt/stop_line/illegal_parking.

features.notes: LEGAL_MAP extended with seatbelt (S194B), stop_line (S119/177), illegal_parking (S122).

features.name: Backend REST API
features.description: FastAPI service exposing violations, analytics, evidence, and challans endpoints.

tests.notes: 11 tests: violations CRUD, analytics, evidence, challans CRUD.

features.notes: 8/8 original endpoints + 3 challans endpoints all implemented and tested.

features.name: Evaluation Script
features.description: Precision/recall/F1 on the test set for the detector, plus LPR character/plate-level accuracy, written to outputs/metrics.json.
features.notes: Model evaluation ran successfully on test split (194 images, 311 instances).

features.name: Sample Annotated Outputs (50+)
features.description: Run the end-to-end pipeline on 50+ images to generate annotated evidence images and corresponding JSONL records.
features.notes: Pipeline orchestration implemented. violations.jsonl populated once trained model is placed.

features.name: Optional LLM-Assisted Violations
features.description: Groq vision LLM (meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct) checks for mobile_phone, wrong_side_driving, red_light, seatbelt, stop_line, illegal_parking.
features.notes: All 6 classifications enabled in config. Requires GROQ_API_KEY and llm_violations.enabled: true.

features.name: Challans API
features.description: CRUD endpoints for traffic challans (e-tickets). POST to create from a violation, GET list/detail with fine computation and legal section mapping.

tests.notes: 3 backend API tests + 3 client API tests.

subtasks.name: Client ChallanDetail handles API fetch + preview
ViolationDetail generate challan → POST then navigate

features.notes: Fine map and legal section map in challans route mirror evidence.py. Persisted to outputs/challans.jsonl.

features.name: Computational Efficiency & Scalability Evaluation
features.description: Measure wall-clock time per pipeline stage (preprocess, detect, OCR, LLM), throughput in images/sec, and memory usage. Output as extended metrics.json section. Design doc to be provided separately.

tests.notes: Waiting on design doc from stakeholder.

features.notes: No code written yet. Design doc incoming from user.

features.name: CI Pipeline
features.description: GitHub Actions CI workflow with two jobs: backend (uv sync --frozen, black --check, pytest) and frontend (npm ci, tsc typecheck, vite build). Runs on push/PR to main.

tests.notes: CI is the runner, not a tested module. Backend and frontend tests run within CI.

subtasks.name: Backend job: uv setup, black check, pytest
Frontend job: npm ci, typecheck, build

features.notes: Lean CI — no Docker build, no Python matrix. Easy to extend later.
